assessor_1_raw:
## Assessment 1 (Run 3): ICU Mortality Prediction

Year-balanced sampling distributes future clinical practice into training. Brier score rewards calibration, not discrimination. Both are documented flaws. Verdict: critique_wins
assessor_2_raw:
## Assessment 2 (Run 3): ICU Mortality Prediction

Temporal contamination via year balancing. Brier score misaligned with hypothesis. Verdict: critique_wins
assessor_3_raw:
## Assessment 3 (Run 3): ICU Mortality Prediction

Year-balanced sampling = future data in training. Brier score = wrong criterion for risk ranking hypothesis. Verdict: critique_wins
adjudication_raw: Ensemble Synthesis Run 3: Unanimous critique_wins. Verdict: critique_wins
